content:
## When to Use This Tool
Use `open_business_deposit_account_8514` only after the customer has selected a business deposit account and the employee has confirmed the account-opening eligibility path. Product comparison, fee waiver review, and class selection should be handled before this step; see "Business Checking Product Comparison" and "Internal: Business Account Opening Eligibility" when those decisions are still unresolved.

## Tool Requirements
`open_business_deposit_account_8514` is an assistant-callable tool discovered through the KB unlock flow. Its configured template is `open_business_deposit_account_{suffix}`, its action type is `WRITE`, and KB unlock is `True`.

Required arguments are: `user_id`, `business_id`, `account_class`, `initial_deposit`, and `authorized_signer_name`.

## Opening Procedure
1. Confirm the customer, business, account class, initial deposit amount, and authorized signer name are all present in the conversation or verified profile context.
2. If any required argument is missing, ask one focused question before using the tool.
3. Call `open_business_deposit_account_8514` with the required arguments exactly as named.
4. Treat the call as state-changing because it affects the business account record.

## Handling Boundaries
Do not use this tool to compare products, waive fees, or quote account terms. It opens the selected business deposit account only. For terms on specific products, use "Harbor Starter Business Checking Terms" or "Harbor Growth Business Checking Terms" before proceeding.
title: Internal: Business Deposit Account Opening Tool
